def negative_mutable_class_attribute_used_as_instance_storage():
    rule_id = "mutable_class_attribute_used_as_instance_storage"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag class attributes that accidentally store per-instance mutable state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
